findings.evidence: The new signatures at lines 113-158 add `[MulAction.IsPretransitive ...]`, `[H.Normal]`, and `hreg`; nearby `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff` at `SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:78` reduces equality to `φ • e ∈ MulAction.orbit H e`, and `fiber_isCancelSMul` at `Connected.lean:89` supplies the only deck-action hypothesis needed to cancel `φ • e = h • e`.
findings.fix: State the core lemmas as `[IsCancelSMul (Deck p) (p ⁻¹' {b})] (H : Subgroup (Deck p)) ...`, and make the regular wrappers require only `hp : IsCoveringMap p` plus `[PreconnectedSpace E]` to get `fiber_isCancelSMul`, not `hreg` or `[H.Normal]`.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_smul_eq_base_iff`, `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitClass_smul_eq_base_iff`, `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_base_eq_smul_iff`, and `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitClass_base_eq_smul_iff` require `[H.Normal]` and pretransitivity/regularity even though the claim is true for any subgroup under a cancellative fibre action.

summary: The normalizer-quotient equality criteria are at the intended normal-subgroup level, but the base-orbit criteria are stated with unnecessary normality and transitivity assumptions.
